description: Average token cost for AGI models worldwide.Costs have plummeted ~120x overall, from $60/M tokens in 2021 to ~$0.5/M in 2025, with median annual reductions of 50x post-2024 due to commoditization (e.g., open-source Llama models) and efficiency gains (e.g., quantization). The speed of becoming cost-effective accelerated in 2024–2025, with 10–200x yearly drops tied to inference optimizations reducing compute needs by 4–30x
